## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and website migration issues.](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance shows significant growth: impressions doubled month-over-month, with 371 clicks last week (320 from new content, 51 from revivals)](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Backlink acquisition strategy is working well, with 17 high-quality backlinks gained in November alone](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Website migration causing some formatting issues, requiring manual fixes for \~200 blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [Team to prioritize optimizing top-performing articles first, aiming to complete by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

## Topics

### AI Impact on Search Behavior

  - [Some AI founders report 20% drop in SEO traffic over last 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [ChatGPT and Perplexity AI now account for \~8% of global searches (5 billion searches as of Oct 31)](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Optimization strategies: vector similarity for content sections, extensive FAQs, reverse engineering AI sources](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

### SEO Performance Metrics

  - [Traffic doubled month-over-month](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Last week: 371 total clicks (320 from new content, 51 from revivals)](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Specific articles (e.g., "40 statistics on short-form video") ranking well, driving traffic](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Implemented "reverse silo SEO" approach](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [October: 8 high-quality backlinks gained](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [November: 17 high-quality backlinks gained already](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Backlinks from reputable sites like BestBuy.com, Lifewire, Android Police](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Estimated value: $500-$700 per backlink if purchased](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)

### Website Migration Issues

  - [Migration from coded text to rich text back to coded text causing formatting problems](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [\~200 blog posts need manual fixes (est. 3-4 hours total work)](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Team to prioritize fixing top 30-50 performing articles first](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Need to disable H1 tags in CMS to avoid duplicate H1s](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [Team to provide video tutorial on GA reporting process](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Will create list of GrowthX-created articles for easier tracking](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [Jorge requests Loom video on exact GA report creation process](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to provide video tutorial on blog post formatting fixes](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Team to optimize top 30-50 performing articles by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Jorge to check on Carolyn's contract status for additional help](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Prateek to create and share Loom video on GA reporting process](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Jorge to share exact GA report requirements with Prateek](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [Team to continue focusing on content clusters that perform well](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Implement reverse silo SEO strategy on existing high-performing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/xazHrzc1o6bMDvzWY_s5DtWNWHNdagMe?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
